description: Single-pane health summary for Sentry self-hosted. Pulls one signal from each subsystem so you know where to drill down.

options.content: This dashboard answers: **Is my Sentry healthy?** Each row summarizes one subsystem. If a number looks wrong, open the matching subsystem dashboard.

panels.title: UI & API: Can users reach Sentry?
Event Processing: Is the pipeline flowing?
Tasks Manager: Are tasks keeping up?
Background Workflows: Are notifications and rules firing?
Failures: Where should I look first?

title: Self-Hosted Sentry: Overview
